description: You are a Solar Installation Manager working for a school district in Colorado. You have been asked to assess a flat-roof elementary school building for solar panel installation. The building model (Solar_Project.skp) is open in SketchUp Make 2017 with Skelion. Review the solar resource data on the Desktop (denver_solar_data.txt) for site details and design requirements. Configure the model for the correct project site, place an appropriate number of panels, and produce a shadow analysis report documenting your assessment. Save the report to the Desktop.

data_sources.coordinates: Real GPS: Denver, CO downtown area (39.5870N, 104.7476W)
data_sources.solar_resource: NREL PVWatts — Denver annual GHI 5.31 kWh/m2/day
data_sources.shading: Real Denver winter solstice sun angle ~27 degrees
